THEAPPRENTICE-PLAN.title: Plan
THEAPPRENTICE-PLAN.description: Choose a card in your hand. Apply [keyword]Planned[/keyword] to it.
THEAPPRENTICE-PLAN+.description: Choose [blue]2[/blue] cards in your hand. Apply [keyword]Planned[/keyword] to them.
THEAPPRENTICE-EXECUTE_PLANS.title: Execute Plans
THEAPPRENTICE-EXECUTE_PLANS.description: Play all [keyword]Planned[/keyword] cards in the order they were planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-EXECUTE_PLANS+.description: Play all [keyword]Planned[/keyword] cards in the order they were planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-SCRAP_PLANS.title: Scrap Plans
THEAPPRENTICE-SCRAP_PLANS.description: Discard all [keyword]Planned[/keyword] cards in your hand. Draw [blue]1[/blue] per card discarded.
THEAPPRENTICE-SCRAP_PLANS+.description: Discard all [keyword]Planned[/keyword] cards in your hand. Draw [blue]1[/blue] per card discarded.
